# Shailesh Chaudhari — Portfolio

> Software Engineer specializing in full-stack web development with Next.js, React, Node.js, and TypeScript.

Shailesh Chaudhari is a Software Engineer based in Gujarat, India. He currently works at ContextQA building developer tools — Chrome extensions for automated web testing and accessibility auditing (~1,600–1,900 merged PRs each). Previously at eSparkBiz Technologies. BE in Information Technology from Government Engineering College Bhavnagar (2024, CGPA 7.99). Institute Rank 1 on GeeksforGeeks with 604+ problems solved.

## Pages

- [Home](https://shaileshchaudhari.vercel.app/): Introduction, featured blog posts, availability for hire
- [About](https://shaileshchaudhari.vercel.app/about): Professional experience, education, skills, achievements
- [Portfolio](https://shaileshchaudhari.vercel.app/portfolio): Project showcase with architecture details and live demos
- [Blog](https://shaileshchaudhari.vercel.app/blogs): Technical articles on web development and software engineering
- [Statistics](https://shaileshchaudhari.vercel.app/statistics): GitHub contributions, LeetCode stats, competitive programming metrics
- [Contact](https://shaileshchaudhari.vercel.app/contact): Contact form, available for part-time and freelance work
- [Hire](https://shaileshchaudhari.vercel.app/hire): Services, rates, and engagement details

## Projects

- [EduScale](https://eduscale.vercel.app/): Real-time engineering learning platform. Backend uses @socket.io/redis-adapter (horizontal Socket.io scaling), redlock (distributed locks preventing race conditions), opossum (circuit breaker on external services), prom-client (Prometheus /metrics endpoint), Bull queues. Stack: Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript, Node.js, Express, Prisma, PostgreSQL, Redis.
- [DevTrack](https://daily-dev-track.vercel.app): Developer analytics dashboard tracking coding patterns and prescriptive recommendations. Stack: Next.js, TypeScript, Prisma, PostgreSQL, Recharts.
- [KhataGO](https://khatago.vercel.app/): WhatsApp-first AI accounting platform for Indian SMBs. WhatsApp Business API webhook with Redis-based deduplication, Gemini AI OCR for receipt photos → structured transactions, Tally ERP XML export. Stack: Next.js, Gemini AI, WhatsApp Cloud API, PostgreSQL, Redis, Bull Queues, i18n. (Private repo)
- [CodeSenseiSearch](https://github.com/Shailesh93602/CodeSenseiSearch): AI-powered semantic code search engine. NestJS backend with pgvector, function-level chunking, OpenAI embeddings, cosine similarity ranking. Natural language queries return ranked file+line results.
- redis-battle-demo: Standalone proof-of-concept for the EduScale distributed real-time engine. Express + Socket.io + @socket.io/redis-adapter (pub/sub clients) + Redlock (retryCount:0, distributed tick mutex). Docker Compose starts Redis. Live demo UI shows server tick events across horizontally-scaled instances.
- CareerGlyph (WIP): Developer identity platform. NestJS monorepo backend, Prisma + PostgreSQL schema (Developer, Skill with SkillCategory/SkillLevel enums, Project, Endorsement). GET /profile/:username endpoint with 404 for unknown/private profiles. Swagger-annotated API.
- Vibe Testing (ContextQA): Chrome extension for AI-powered web testing with real-time log streaming. ~1,900 merged PRs. Stack: Chrome Extension, Python AI Agent, Node.js, Socket.io.
- AxeTos (ContextQA): Chrome extension for WCAG A/AA/AAA accessibility testing with intelligent fix suggestions and persistent script-injection remediation. ~1,600 merged PRs. Stack: Chrome Extension, Node.js, axe-core, AWS S3.

## Skills

TypeScript · React · Next.js · Node.js · Express.js · NestJS · PostgreSQL · MongoDB · Redis · Prisma · Tailwind CSS · Socket.io · @socket.io/redis-adapter · Redlock · Circuit Breaker (opossum) · Prometheus (prom-client) · Bull Queues · Vector Embeddings · pgvector · Chrome Extensions · Supabase · Docker · AWS · Playwright · WCAG Accessibility · NestJS Monorepo · Swagger/OpenAPI
